description:
# Why

bl-eb76 added a manual symlink repoint to the master_url_repo() helper in tests/doctor_master_url.rs to work around the pre-bl-773e drift: bl init dropped a worktree/.balls/tasks symlink and bl remaster --commit left it alone, so doctor's new symlink check (correctly) flagged the test fixture as drifted. bl-773e (a4a3314) then taught ensure_tasks_symlink to repoint stale targets, which makes the manual repoint a no-op and turns the explanatory comment into a misleading historical artifact ("until bl-773e teaches...").

# Fix

In tests/doctor_master_url.rs master_url_repo():
- Remove the manual fs::remove_file + std::os::unix::fs::symlink block.
- Drop the comment that references bl-773e as not-yet-shipped.
- The healthy_state_repo_is_silent test will still pass because bl remaster --commit now produces a correct symlink unaided.

# Scope

Test-fixture cleanup only. No production code change. Single file.

# Origin

bl-eb76 close-out (2026-05-20). bl-773e landed during bl-eb76's review window; the workaround it required is no longer needed but the workaround code shipped alongside the bl-eb76 doctor check.
title: doctor tests: drop redundant symlink repoint in master_url_repo fixture
